---
title: "Heart the Lover by Lily King - Review"
---

Wow. I loved this book. I finished it in one weekend because I didn't want to put it down. It was such a refreshing contrast from other romances I've read that follow a cookie-cutter plot progression, and often fail to accurately emote love and loss. This book did just that. It showed that the deepest love often comes from real friendships, and that the you can be with the right person just at the wrong time. The last third of the book was so sad, but I still enjoyed reading it and will be searching from that feeling from a book in the future.
